title: TurkStat Consumer Price Index — index numbers and rate of changes (2003=100 and 2025=100 bases)
units: index numbers and % change, base year = 100
notes: TurkStat's data.tuik.gov.tr redirects to the new veriportali.tuik.gov.tr SPA. Its category tree (and signed, tokenized per-file download URLs) is served by an internal JSON API at https://veriportali.tuik.gov.tr/api/en/data/statistical-themes (~1.2MB, fetched via browser same-origin fetch since a bare curl to that endpoint 404s without proper session context). Each leaf table node in that tree has a 'url' field of the form /api/en/data/downloads?t=i&p=<base64-like signed token>, and those download URLs DO work via plain curl (no cookies/session needed) once extracted from the tree. CPI path in the tree: Statistical Themes > Price Statistics > Consumer Price Index (CPI) > Tables and Graphics > Consumer Price Indices (2003=100) / (2025=100) > 'Index numbers and rate of changes in the consumer price index'. Only 2003- and 2025-base tables are exposed on the modern portal; the task's '1982-' long back-run lives in the older MEDAS interactive database at http://biruni.tuik.gov.tr/medas/?kn=162&locale=en, which is a legacy query-builder tool, not a flat downloadable file — not scraped here due to time budget; flagged for follow-up if the pre-2003 series is specifically needed.
